data.title: Tesla Cybertruck Receives 5-Star Safety Rating: 'Apocalypse-Level Safe,' Says Elon Musk
data.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) on Monday gave Tesla's stainless steel Cybertruck a 5-star overall safety rating.

data.title: Changpeng 'CZ' Zhao Donates $100,000 To Support LIBRA Scam Victims As Javier Milei Compares Investment In Coin To Casino Gambling
data.description: Changpeng Zhao, the founder of the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange Binance, donated $100,000 worth of BNB (CRYPTO: BNB) tokens on Tuesday to a fundraiser aiding victims of the LIBRA memecoin scam.

data.title: Tempus AI Sees Surge In Institutional Holdings In Q4: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest, JPMorgan, And BlackRock Load Up On TEM Stock
data.description: Tempus AI has seen major funds like Ark, JPMorgan, UBS, Goldman, Barclays, and others investing in the company during the Q4 of 2024.

data.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Prepares For India Expansion, Engineer Confirms Hiring Push: 'We Are Looking For Motivated Talent To Help Us…'
data.description: Tesla is looking to launch its vehicles in India, a employee confirmed after the company listed several job openings in the country.

data.title: Elon Musk Defends DOGE Initiatives, Says His Role Is To Provide Trump With Tech Support: 'If The Bureaucracy Is Fighting The Will Of The People…'
data.description: Elon Musk defended his role in the Trump administration's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), stating that his primary job is to ensure executive orders are enforced, while his growing political involvement sparks legal challenges and investor concerns about Tesla.
